surface_verification.justification: Tooling + CI-config change: a tailored CodeQL query-filter config plus Python script hardening (file modes, two ReDoS regexes, a test loop-capture fix, removal of 13 dead module globals). No product web/api/cli/UI/store surface is introduced or changed. Verified by the full shared suites (3556+196+61), all four touched plugin suites (adopt 334, test 143, rollback-plugin 26, compliance 707) and the cross-plugin integration suite (169), all CI-style, plus ruff clean.

degraded: The six untouched plugin suites (run/project/plan/design/changelog/preview/security/iterate) were delegated to CI: none import the changed shared modules on a path the green shared + integration suites do not already exercise.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: claim/marker/drop files are created owner-only (0o600), not world-readable
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_event_once.py::test_create_claim_is_owner_only PASSED (asserts st_mode 0o600 on POSIX); the 4 other sites use the identical os.open(...,0o600) pattern with create paths covered by the green hook/tool suites

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: _GITHUB_HOST_RE parses every recognised remote unchanged AND a catastrophic input fails fast
AC-2: _FR_TABLE_RE parses 3/5/6-column rows unchanged AND a catastrophic input fails fast
AC-3: each generated fixture check reports its own id (no loop-variable late-binding)
AC-4: result is always bound for any --strategy value (defensive else)
behaviors.reason: the else is unreachable by argparse choices=[git,clone]; it is a static-analysis guard with no runtime-reachable state. The reachable git/clone dispatch + validation are covered by plugins/shipwright-deploy/tests/test_rollback.py

behaviors.behavior: AC-5: 13 truly-dead module globals removed and 8 live/deliberate ones kept, with no breakage anywhere
behaviors.evidence: ruff clean + full shared (3556+196+61) + four plugin suites + integration (169) green after removals

behaviors.behavior: AC-6: the CodeQL config excludes exactly the six ruff-owned/convention-conflicting query ids and excludes no security or high-value-correctness query
